2.description: inspect AR50 categories within Stavanger bbox

3.description: get AR50 polygons for agricultural land within Stavanger bbox

4.description: get teig parcels in Stavanger municipality

5.description: find teig parcels intersecting agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teig

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT artype, arjordbr FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr, arkartstd, artype FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833)) ORDER BY arjordbr NULLS LAST;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
